name: Xenous Holdings, Inc.
business: Xenous Holdings, Inc. is a shell company with no current business operations. It is seeking potential assets, property or businesses to acquire. As of the filing, the company has not identified any definitive acquisition target and has no products or services.

exposures.sentence: Since the initial announcement on regarding the proposed acquisition of Dadvance Agarwood Alpha Sdn Bhd (Dadvance) on November 14, 2022 and even when the initial negotiation was unsuccessful, the Company has maintained an active and comprehensive evaluation process.
